name: The Figure-Works
descriptionSeed: Where symbols are made that ACT. The Figurists build meanings and send them to work, and the meanings do exactly what they mean, which is not always what was wanted, which is the entire history of this people's disasters.
encounterFlavor: Figure-wrights whose work is beautiful and slightly wrong; a walking figure on an errand; a standing figure applying a rule to cases nobody imagined.
questSeeds: A standing figure has been applying its rule for a hundred years and has begun improvising
A figure has been made OF someone, and it is walking around
